title: Critical Bug Fix: Remove Duplicate Code + Challenge Puzzles (Set 1)

tasks.title: CRITICAL: Remove 6x duplicate code blocks from Day 14
tasks.description: Day 14 introduced 6 copies of the keyboard shortcuts code in CSS, HTML, and JS sections. This causes 'let selectedTool' redeclaration errors that break all JavaScript execution. The page loads but no JS works.

changes.description: Remove 5 duplicate CSS blocks (lines ~1053-1606): each contains /* PALETTE SELECTED */ + /* KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS OVERLAY */ CSS rules. Keep only the first instance (lines ~942-1052).
Remove 5 duplicate <!-- Keyboard Shortcuts Modal --> HTML blocks. Keep only the first instance (lines ~1673-1702).

Remove 5 duplicate JS blocks (lines ~6012-6860) containing: let selectedTool/hoveredCell, TOOL_KEY_MAP, selectTool, clearSelectedTool, initHoverTracking, handleKeyDown, openShortcutsModal, closeShortcutsModal, closeShortcutsModalOutside. Keep only the first instance (lines ~5842-6009).

acceptance_criteria: Zero JS console errors on page load
Only 1 instance of each: #shortcuts-overlay CSS, shortcuts HTML modal, keyboard JS functions
All keyboard shortcuts work (Space, R, Z, Shift+Z, N, C, Tab, 1-7, Del, ?, Esc)
File size reduced by ~800-900 lines (from ~6936 to ~6100)

tasks.title: Challenge Puzzles System (Set 1 — 5 puzzles)
tasks.description: Add a puzzle mode with 5 hand-crafted puzzles of increasing difficulty. Players get limited pieces and must complete a track layout with some pre-placed locked cells.

changes.description: Add puzzle-related CSS: puzzle overlay/modal styles, locked cell indicator (semi-transparent lock icon), limited palette badge (count), puzzle-active indicator, check button styles.
Add 🧩 Puzzles button in controls bar. Add puzzle select overlay with 5 puzzle cards. Add puzzle HUD (puzzle name, piece counts, check button, back to sandbox button).

Implement puzzle system: puzzle definitions (5 puzzles), loadPuzzle(), checkPuzzleSolution(), puzzle piece counting/enforcement, locked cell protection, puzzle mode state management, back-to-sandbox function.

puzzles.name: First Loop
puzzles.description: 4 curves pre-placed at corners. Add 4 straights to complete the rectangle loop.

puzzles.name: Bridge Over Water
puzzles.description: Water strip in the middle. Use bridge pieces to cross and complete the loop.

puzzles.name: Figure Eight
puzzles.description: Create a figure-8 using the crossover piece with limited track pieces.

puzzles.name: Tunnel Run
puzzles.description: Route the train through 2 tunnels around water obstacles.

puzzles.name: Grand Station
puzzles.description: Connect 3 pre-placed stations in one continuous loop.

acceptance_criteria: 🧩 Puzzles button visible in controls bar
Puzzle select overlay shows 5 puzzle cards with name, difficulty, description
Loading a puzzle clears the board and places locked pieces
Locked pieces cannot be moved, removed, or rotated (visual lock indicator)
Palette shows only available pieces with count badges
Count badges decrement when pieces are placed, increment on undo/remove
Cannot place pieces when count is 0 for that type
Check button validates: all available pieces placed AND track forms a complete loop
Success: confetti + toast + puzzle marked complete
Failure: helpful toast explaining what's wrong
'Back to Sandbox' button returns to freeform mode with empty board
Puzzle state does NOT affect sandbox auto-save
Train can be placed and run on completed puzzle
Undo works within puzzle mode (respects locked pieces)

bugs_to_fix.description: 6x duplicate code blocks from Day 14 (CSS, HTML, JS) causing JS execution failure

testing_focus: JS console must be error-free after duplicate removal
Puzzle mode doesn't corrupt sandbox state
Piece counting is accurate through place/remove/undo cycles
Regression test: Random → Play → full loop still works
